Class EvidenceKind

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology.EvidenceKind
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public class EvidenceKind extends ExtensibleEnum
An extensible enumeration for types of evidence.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
